title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at LinkedIn Learning India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!
